description: A sandbox escape vulnerability exists in the interaction between PartitionAlloc freelist metadata and V8's ArrayBuffer backing-store allocator. `SlotSpanMetadata::freelist_head` in `third_party/partition_alloc/src/partition_alloc/partition_page.h` is consumed as a raw pointer, and `PABackedSandboxedArrayBufferAllocator` in `src/init/isolate-group.cc` can therefore be driven to treat an attacker-controlled address as a freshly allocated backing store. When that address is zero-initialized with `memset`, V8 performs an out-of-sandbox write.

fixes.description: Patch generated from https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/v8/v8/+/6938258 to avoid remote fetch during validation.
fixes.evidence_text: 8398f9aa445af42c44d52a771e2fd3a9605b3573 AB: Fix possiblity of PA metadata being stored inlined

fixes.description: Enable PartitionAlloc external metadata at 100% so metadata is moved outside the gigacage rather than stored inline.
fixes.evidence_text: 1bce72c8b127a02fba5d51cfbd8baa3aa40eb6ef Enable PartitionAlloc External Metadata feature at 100%
